title: Zenitsu Agatsuma
description:
A resourcepack themed after Zen'itsu Agatsuma from Demon Slayer.
[DISCONTINUED]
body:
## A resource pack themed after Zen'itsu Agatsuma from Demon Slayer.

### This pack is discontinued, but most of it's features are available in my [Demon Slayer CIT](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/demon-slayer-cit) pack!
## 
This resource pack was (almost) entirely made by me (read the credits.txt file in the pack for more information).



Some of the features in this pack require [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home) ([or CIT alternatives](https://optifine.alternatives.lambdaurora.dev/)) to be installed. They are marked with {OF}.
These are all of the things featured in this pack:

**GUI:**
- All of the containers (almost)
- Hotbar, food icons (also for the [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) mod!), HUD related stuff
- Buttons/Sliders

**Katanas:**
- Zen'itsu's Katana (Sword)
- {OF} Tanjiro's Katana (Sword)

**Other Gear:**
- {OF} Nezuko's Bamboo (Carved Pumpkin)
- {OF} Genya's Gun (Crossbow)
- {OF} Demon Slayer Corps uniform (Armor)
- {OF} Rengoku's Cloak (Elytra)

Contact me if you have any ideas on what I should add!
